get.description: Returns every host that answered DNS queries in the capture, with resolved vs. failed counts and an NXDOMAIN-based suspicious flag (possible DNS tunnelling / domain-generation algorithm).

get.description: Returns the per-domain query log (hostname queried, response code, resolved IPs, query count, resolvable) for the given DNS server, plus summary counts and the suspicious verdict.

get.description: Returns the conversation that contains the given packet (frame number) so the UI can open and highlight it.

get.description: Returns the top N hosts ranked by bytes, packets, conversations, or risk count.

get.description: Returns every host classified as a web/API server (includes HTTPS-only hosts), with success vs. error response counts and a 4xx-based suspicious flag (possible endpoint enumeration / scanning).
get.summary: List web/API servers and their HTTP health

get.description: Returns the per-endpoint log (method, path, status-class counts, content type) plus server software, content types and TLS metadata (cleartext HTTP only for endpoints; TLS detail for HTTPS).
get.summary: Get the HTTP endpoint log + detail for one web/API server
